prompt: DevBoss 5-hour sprint continuation: exercise end-to-end-loop and caveman-code on locally available/provided repositories, especially tdrrecherche; stay read-only/dry-run for target repos; record evidence, blockers, learning candidates, and Copilot availability; validate changed end-to-end-loop artifacts; no live deploy or destructive target changes.
commands_or_evidence: Target main worktree /opt/data/repos/tdrrecherche is on main at f45b2c9 with clean status; feature worktree /opt/data/worktrees/tdrrecherche/feat-complete-wordpress-design-samples is on feat/complete-wordpress-design-samples at bde99b7 with clean status.
No .end-to-end-loop/memory.md or memory.local.md files were present in the target feature worktree; PROJECT_STATE.md and README.md were read as handoff context.
Scenario chosen: read-only static prototype and WordPress scaffold form/accessibility handoff audit, focused on whether the client-review sampler can safely inform production contact-form conversion.

HTML form/accessibility parser audit: sampler index.html has lang=nl, title present, 5 h1s, 5 POST forms, 5 prototype action targets, 19 form fields, 15 named fields, 15 required fields, 4 unlabeled/unnamed optional phone inputs, and no detected skip link.

Standalone variants A-D each have lang=nl, title present, 1 h1, 1 POST form, prototype action target, 4 fields, 3 named/required fields, 1 unlabeled/unnamed optional phone input, and no detected skip link; variant E has 3 named/required fields and no unlabeled fields but also no detected skip link.

WordPress scaffold contact.php is intentionally a placeholder saying the contact form will be connected later; theme header.php includes a skip link to #main and front-page.php defines <main id=main>.

WordPress textual readiness audit found 10 PHP files; placeholder appears in 6 template parts; nonce/wp_nonce/admin_post/wp_ajax/wp_mail are absent; required theme files style.css/functions.php/front-page.php/header.php/footer.php exist but index.php is still missing.
Raw echo scan in theme PHP found no echo statements lacking esc_* in the scanned files; unsafe PHP runtime lint remains blocked because php is not installed.
Copilot path checked: gh is authenticated, but gh copilot prompt execution returned `! Copilot CLI not installed`, so no Copilot findings were available.
No target repo files were written; target git status remained clean after audit.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Discover target repo state and any .end-to-end-loop memory
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Main f45b2c9 and feature bde99b7 worktrees are clean; target .end-to-end-loop memory files were not present.
Selected form/accessibility handoff audit because prior runs identified production contact-form integration as the largest unresolved readiness risk.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Exercise the loop as far as safe with real commands/read-only checks
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Ran parser-based HTML form/accessibility audit, WordPress scaffold textual readiness audit, raw echo scan, Copilot availability check, and git status checks without target writes.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Record evidence, blockers, learning candidates, and Copilot availability
acceptance_criteria.evidence: This result log records unlabeled/unnamed optional phone fields, missing prototype skip links, placeholder/no-nonce contact scaffold state, missing index.php, php-lint blocker, and Copilot CLI unavailability.
This JSON result log is commit-safe and was followed by skill validation, JSON validation, and diff whitespace checks recorded in the final report.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Do not live deploy or destructively modify target repos
acceptance_criteria.evidence: No deploy, package install, destructive command, target commit, or target file write was performed; target git status remained clean.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Static prototypes are production-ready contact-form sources
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Prototype forms still post to action=#, A-D optional phone fields lack name/label/aria-label, no prototype skip link was detected, and WordPress contact handling/nonce/spam/SMTP remains unresolved.

learning_candidates.text: Static-to-WordPress dry-runs should audit form field names and accessible labels, not just parseability; optional fields with only placeholders are not production-ready.
learning_candidates.reason: Portable quality gate discovered concrete prototype-to-production drift; privacy-safe and durable.

learning_candidates.text: For accessibility dry-runs, record lang/title/h1 counts, prototype form actions, named/required fields, unlabeled fields, and skip-link presence per standalone prototype.
learning_candidates.reason: Reusable read-only eval pattern with observed evidence in this run.

learning_candidates.text: A WordPress scaffold contact section that is only a placeholder and has no nonce/admin_post/wp_ajax/wp_mail path cannot be counted as a verified contact-form implementation.
learning_candidates.reason: Recurring production-readiness blocker for this repo class; prevents false green claims.

learning_candidates.text: Copilot findings remain unavailable when gh copilot returns `! Copilot CLI not installed`, even with authenticated gh.
learning_candidates.reason: Environment-specific and already captured by previous result logs.

copilot_findings.summary: GitHub CLI is authenticated, but the Copilot prompt path is unavailable in this cron environment: gh copilot returned `! Copilot CLI not installed`.

notes: Read-only/dry-run audit refined the production contact-form blocker: prototype actions are placeholders and A-D optional phone inputs need names/labels before conversion. Only end-to-end-loop evaluation artifacts were written.
